if(LIB_GOOGLETEST_OPTION)
    add_subdirectory(googletest)
endif()

if(LIB_HV_OPTION)
    option(BUILD_STATIC "build static library" OFF)
    option(BUILD_EXAMPLES "build examples" OFF)
    option(ENABLE_UDS "Unix Domain Socket" ON)
    option(WITH_OPENSSL "with openssl library" OFF)
    add_subdirectory(libhv)
endif()

if(LIB_CONCURRENTQUEUE_OPTION)
    add_subdirectory(concurrentqueue)
endif()

if(LIB_READERWRITERQUEUE_OPTION)
    add_subdirectory(readerwriterqueue)
endif()

if(LIB_LIBZMQ_OPTION)
    option(BUILD_STATIC "Whether or not to build the static archive" OFF)
    option(BUILD_TESTS "Whether or not to build the tests" OFF)
    option(WITH_DOCS "Build html docs" OFF)
    add_subdirectory(libzmq)
endif()

if(LIB_LOCKFREE_MPMC_QUEUE_OPTION)
    #add_subdirectory(lockfree_mpmc_queue) # see example
    file(GLOB LOCKFREE_HEADERS "lockfree_mpmc_queue/*.h")
    install(FILES ${LOCKFREE_HEADERS} DESTINATION include/lockfree_mpmc_queue)
endif()

if(LIB_CZMQ_OPTION)
    if(NOT LIB_LIBZMQ_OPTION)
        message(FATAL_ERROR "Error: CZMQ requires LIBZMQ. Please enable LIB_LIBZMQ_OPTION!")
    endif()
    option(CZMQ_BUILD_STATIC "Whether or not to build the static archive" OFF)
    list(APPEND CMAKE_PREFIX_PATH "${CPUNCHLINE_PRE_BUILT_DIR}")
    add_subdirectory(czmq)
endif()

if(LIB_CPPZMQ_OPTION)
    if(NOT LIB_LIBZMQ_OPTION)
        message(FATAL_ERROR "Error: CPPZMQ requires LIBZMQ. Please enable LIB_LIBZMQ_OPTION!")
    endif()
    option(CPPZMQ_BUILD_TESTS OFF)
    add_subdirectory(cppzmq)
endif()

if(LIB_NNG_OPTION)
    option(NNG_ELIDE_DEPRECATED ON)
    option(NNG_ENABLE_COMPAT OFF)
    option(NNG_TESTS OFF)
    add_subdirectory(nng)
endif()

if(LIB_UTHASH_OPTION)
    install(DIRECTORY uthash/src/ DESTINATION include)
endif()

if(LIB_NANOPB_OPTION)
    set(BUILD_STATIC_LIBS OFF CACHE BOOL "Build static libraries" FORCE)
    set(BUILD_SHARED_LIBS ON CACHE BOOL "Build shared libraries" FORCE)
    set(nanopb_PYTHON_INSTDIR_OVERRIDE "${CPUNCHLINE_PRE_BUILT_DIR}" CACHE PATH "Override the default python installation directory with the given path")
    add_subdirectory(nanopb)
endif()

if(LIB_THREAD_POOL_OPTION)
    install(DIRECTORY thread-pool/include/ DESTINATION include/thread-pool)
endif()

if(LIB_SPDLOG_OPTION)
    set(SPDLOG_BUILD_SHARED ON)
    set(SPDLOG_MASTER_PROJECT ON)
    add_subdirectory(spdlog)
endif()

if(LIB_MOSQUITTO_OPTION)
    option(WITH_TLS "Build with TLS support?" OFF)
    option(WITH_TESTS "Enable tests" OFF)
    option(DOCUMENTATION "Build documentation?" OFF)
    add_subdirectory(mosquitto)
endif()
